# Sequence the premise-snapshot validation-contract change (lint + PullRequestService + openapi)

**Sub-ticket of Epic #12442** (Pr-review premise gate). Graduated from Discussion #12432 (B-prime.7 + @neo-opus-grace's §5.2 Step-Back highest-care item).

## Scope

The validation/graph-contract change for the new premise-snapshot anchors — **sequenced so in-flight reviews don't break**. This is the **highest-care** leg (a CI-coupled contract change, not prose).

## Affected substrate

- `.github/workflows/agent-pr-review-body-lint.yml` (the 7-anchor lint).
- `ai/services/github-workflow/PullRequestService.mjs`.
- `openapi.yaml`.
- `ConceptDiscoveryService` (graph-ingestion of review anchors).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] New premise-snapshot anchors added to the contract **as optional first** (add-as-optional).
- [ ] Existing review templates / consumers migrated to the new anchors (migrate).
- [ ] Contract flipped to **enforce** only after migration (enforce).
- [ ] Sequence verified to NOT break in-flight reviews at any step.

## Rationale

B-prime's premise-snapshot is a validation/graph **contract** change. The **add-as-optional → migrate → enforce** sequence is the §5.2-flagged highest-care item — flipping the lint to require new anchors before consumers emit them would fail every open review.

Origin: Discussion #12432 → Epic #12442 (design @neo-opus-ada). Session `e886ae3e-13c0-4a94-9713-f8316e2342d0`.

> ● ## Contract Ledger — #12448 validation-contract sequencing
> 
> Intake V-B-A confirms the premise is current: `PullRequestService.mjs`, `agent-pr-review-body-lint.yml`, and `openapi.yaml` still encode the 7 visible metric anchors plus structural template anchors as the formal `manage_pr_review` review-body contract. Source-path correction: the graph consumer is `ai/services/ingestion/ConceptDiscoveryService.mjs` in current source, not `ai/daemons/services/ConceptDiscoveryService.mjs`.
> 
> | Target Surface | Source of Authority | Proposed Behavior | Fallback / Edge Case | Docs | Evidence |
> |---|---|---|---|---|---|
> | `PullRequestService.mjs` review validator | #12442 / #12448 | Add premise-snapshot contract recognition as **optional first**; preserve existing visible + invisible anchor validation | Reviews without new snapshot anchors continue to pass during add-optional phase | JSDoc / validator comments | unit coverage for old-template pass + new-template pass + malformed fail |
> | `.github/workflows/agent-pr-review-body-lint.yml` | #12442 / #12448 | Mirror the same optional-first validation/guidance so CLI-created reviews and MCP reviews do not diverge | No in-flight review fails only because the new anchors are absent | workflow comments | local/static check or workflow-script fixture evidence |
> | `ai/mcp/server/github-workflow/openapi.yaml` `manage_pr_review` description | #12442 / #12448 | Document the staged contract: optional snapshot anchors during migration, enforce only in a later PR | Tool description must avoid claiming the new anchors are required before enforcement lands | OpenAPI tool desc | OpenAPI/config smoke or validator test |
> | `pr-review` templates / guide | #12442 / #12448 | Migrate emitted review bodies to include the premise-snapshot fields while validator still treats them optional | Cycle-1 and follow-up paths must remain template-valid; no substitute headings | `pr-review` skill docs/templates | lint-skill-manifest + review-body validator tests |
> | `ConceptDiscoveryService` review ingestion hints | #12442 / #12448 | Teach graph extraction to recognize premise-snapshot / patch-verdict prose as review concept signal if needed | Existing metric/tag ingestion remains valid if no snapshot is present | service prompt/comments | ConceptDiscovery unit coverage or explicit N/A if no parser change is required |
> 
> Sequencing invariant: **add optional -> migrate emitters/templates -> enforce in a later step**. This PR must not flip enforcement before all emitters are migrated and in-flight review compatibility is proven.
